name: gitlab
description: GitLab repository workflows for Codex backed by a local MCP server and glab.

interface.shortDescription: Clone, pull, and push GitLab repos through a local MCP server
interface.longDescription: Bring GitLab repository workflows into Codex through a local MCP server that validates glab auth, uses glab for repo discovery and cloning, and uses git for pull and push operations with safe defaults.
defaultPrompt: Use the GitLab MCP tools to clone a repo
Pull the latest changes from this GitLab checkout
Push my current branch through the GitLab plugin
